requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline for Kuwait EVSE

summary.en: IEC 61851 is the international baseline for conductive EV supply equipment safety. IEC 61851-1 covers general EVSE requirements, including control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, protection against electric shock, interlocks, overcurrent, overtemperature and abnormal-operation protections. IEC 61851-23 addresses DC EV charging stations, and IEC 61851-21-2 addresses EMC requirements for off-board EV charging systems. For Kuwait, IEC safety evidence is the conservative evidence package for KUCAS, MEW and project-owner review unless a Kuwait-specific published EV charger specification states otherwise.
summary.zh: IEC 61851是电动汽车传导供电设备安全的国际基线。IEC 61851-1涵盖EVSE通用要求，包括控制导引、保护接地、防触电、互锁、过流、过温和异常运行保护。IEC 61851-23适用于直流电动汽车充电站，IEC 61851-21-2适用于非车载充电系统EMC要求。对于科威特，除非已发布的科威特特定充电桩规范另有规定，IEC安全证据是提交KUCAS、MEW和项目业主审查的保守资料包。
summary.zht: IEC 61851是電動汽車傳導供電設備安全的國際基線。IEC 61851-1涵蓋EVSE通用要求，包括控制導引、保護接地、防觸電、互鎖、過流、過溫和異常運行保護。IEC 61851-23適用於直流電動汽車充電站，IEC 61851-21-2適用於非車載充電系統EMC要求。對於科威特，除非已發布的科威特特定充電樁規範另有規定，IEC安全證據是提交KUCAS、MEW和項目業主審查的保守資料包。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1 - Electric vehicle conductive charging system - General requirements
IEC 61851-23 - DC electric vehicle charging station
IEC 61851-21-2 - EMC requirements for off-board EV charging systems
IEC 60529 - IP Code for enclosure protection
KUCAS / PAI conformity assessment for imported electrical equipment where in scope

summary.en: China's comparable safety baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, with China-specific GB/T 20234 connector and GB/T 27930 communication requirements. A GB/T 18487 report can support engineering analysis but does not automatically demonstrate IEC 61851 compliance for Kuwait-facing KUCAS, MEW or project-owner review.
summary.zh: 中国可比安全基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，并配套中国特有的GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930通信要求。GB/T 18487报告可支持工程分析，但不能自动证明满足面向科威特KUCAS、MEW或项目业主审查的IEC 61851合规性。
summary.zht: 中國可比安全基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，並配套中國特有的GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930通訊要求。GB/T 18487報告可支持工程分析，但不能自動證明滿足面向科威特KUCAS、MEW或項目業主審查的IEC 61851合規性。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety reports, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC chargers, IEC 61851-21-2 EMC evidence, enclosure IP and impact-rating evidence, protective device data, abnormal-operation tests and Kuwait ambient-temperature derating analysis. GB/T-only safety evidence should be mapped clause by clause before it is submitted.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、认可IEC安全报告、直流充电桩IEC 61851-23证据、IEC 61851-21-2 EMC证据、外壳IP和冲击等级证据、保护器件资料、异常运行测试，以及科威特环境温度降额分析。仅有GB/T安全证据时，应先完成逐条映射后再提交。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、認可IEC安全報告、直流充電樁IEC 61851-23證據、IEC 61851-21-2 EMC證據、外殼IP和衝擊等級證據、保護器件資料、異常運行測試，以及科威特環境溫度降額分析。僅有GB/T安全證據時，應先完成逐條映射後再提交。

mandatory_status.target: Expected project and conformity evidence - exact mandatory standard list should be confirmed with PAI / KUCAS, MEW and the project owner for the specific charger type and HS code
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not direct IEC 61851 evidence without a clause-level gap assessment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. A Kuwait-facing EVSE package should include IEC 61851-1, IEC 61851-21-2 and, for DC chargers, IEC 61851-23 evidence plus enclosure and thermal documentation for Kuwait conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向科威特的EVSE资料包应包括IEC 61851-1、IEC 61851-21-2以及直流充电桩IEC 61851-23证据，并提供适配科威特条件的外壳和热设计文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向科威特的EVSE資料包應包括IEC 61851-1、IEC 61851-21-2以及直流充電樁IEC 61851-23證據，並提供適配科威特條件的外殼和熱設計文件。
